summary: Completed comprehensive testing of Branch Admin Board iteration 17 features: 8-stage Kanban pipeline, metric strip, search bar, Lead Detail Modal with 4 tabs (Overview, Actions, Remarks, Activity), consultation fee collection, package payment, Head Physio appointment booking, Jr. Physio assignment. All backend APIs and frontend UI working correctly.
critical_code_review_comments: All 8 branch stages correctly implemented and displayed in Kanban board
Metric strip shows Total and per-stage counts correctly
Search bar filters patients by name/phone/email
Lead Detail Modal has proper 4-tab structure with data-testid attributes
Actions tab correctly shows all 4 action sections: Consultation Fee, Head Physio Appointment, Package Payment, Assign Jr. Physio
Stage movement via Overview tab pipeline buttons works correctly
Activity log correctly records branch stage changes
JSON preview card correctly hidden for branch_admin role
seed_data_creation: 10 test leads seeded across all 8 stages, 4 doctors seeded (2 head_physio, 2 physio)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Branch Admin Board iteration 17 fully tested on https://bizdev-dashboard.preview.emergentagent.com. Login: branchadmin@fitsiomax.com / branch123 (demo dropdown index 4). Branch ID: 7dfb1d87-d007-4825-84a0-ac4016b7c16a (Velachery Fitsiomax). Features verified: 1) 8-stage Kanban pipeline (New Appointment, Call & Confirm, Head Physio Appointment, Consultation Fee Collected, Consultation Done, Follow-up Package Upsell, Package Paid, Jr. Physio Assigned). 2) Metric strip with Total and per-stage counts. 3) Search bar filters by name/phone/email. 4) Lead Detail Modal with 4 tabs (Overview, Actions, Remarks, Activity). 5) Actions tab has Consultation Fee (amount input + Collect button), Head Physio Appointment (date picker + time slots), Package Payment (amount + weeks input), Assign Jr. Physio (physio list). 6) Overview tab has pipeline stage buttons for moving leads. 7) Activity log records stage changes. 8) JSON preview card hidden for branch_admin. Backend APIs tested: GET /api/v3/branch-board/{branch_id}, POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/branch-stage, POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/collect-fee, POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/assign-physio, POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/book-appointment.

features_tested.login: Branch Admin login via demo dropdown (index 4) works correctly

backend_apis_tested.POST /api/v3/auth/login: Works - returns token and user with branch_id
backend_apis_tested.GET /api/v3/branch-board/{branch_id}: Works - returns leads and stage_counts for all 8 stages
backend_apis_tested.POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/branch-stage: Works - moves lead through branch stages and creates activity log
backend_apis_tested.POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/collect-fee (con: Works - collects consultation fee and updates stage to 'Consultation Fee Collected'
backend_apis_tested.POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/collect-fee (pac: Works - collects package fee with weeks and updates stage to 'Package Paid'
backend_apis_tested.POST /api/v3/leads/{id}/assign-physio: Works - assigns Jr. Physio and updates stage to 'Jr. Physio Assigned'
backend_apis_tested.GET /api/v3/doctors?branch_id=X: Works - returns doctors filtered by branch

mocked_api_status: No mocked APIs - all endpoints are live
